Preheat oven to ~450°F.  On sheet trays, spread out Carrot, onion, celery and garlic and dry roast, stir every ~10 minutes
Remove from oven when evenly charred and just starting to blacken
Rinse veal bones in cold water.  Remove excess water and place onto sheet trays, rubbing with the tomato paste
Roast in same oven for ~30-60 minutes, or until the bones have taken on some color and are caramelized
Remove veal bones from the pan and place into large stock pot or tilt skillet.  Deglaze sheet trays with wine, scrape fond.
Add veggies, thyme and peppercorn to the deglazed veal bones and cover with water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a low simmer.  Watch for 4-5 minutes to ensure simmer without overflow.
Once simmer is confirmed, leave overnight.
In the AM, strain and press veggies and bones for all liquid.  Reserve to cambro containers, straining x3 times.
Cool in a blast chiller or ice bath, then store in cooler.
